Description: Required. Root element of the fields related to a tournament calendar. Value (XML only): String giving the tournament calendar name

attributes.Description: Required. Unique ID (UUID) of the tournament calendar
Optional. Unique Opta Core tournament calendar ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta Core legacy ID; the attribute is not present otherwise. Empty string if no such value exists.
Optional. Unique Opta tournament calendar ID. Returned only if the feed is queried by Opta legacy ID; the attribute is not present otherwise. Empty string if no such value exists.
Required. The start date (UTC) of the tournament calendar
Required. The end date (UTC) of the tournament calendar
Required. Name of the tournament calendar
